allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: move UI components to app directory and add Select component

Relocate shared UI components \(alert-dialog, field, input-group, label,
separator, textarea\) from components/ui/ to app/components/ui/ and update
import paths. Remove unused button and input components. Add new Select
dropdown component using Radix UI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add HP, temp HP, and AC columns to combatants table

Extend the combatants schema with hit points \(hp\), temporary hit points
\(tmp_hp\), and armor class \(ac\) fields, all defaulting to 0. Includes
Drizzle migration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
